name: prompt-rewriter
description: Rewrite prompts on demand, with an optional first-prompt Codex hook.

interface.shortDescription: Rewrite prompts on demand or from an optional first-prompt hook.
interface.longDescription: Adds a callable Codex command, helper script, and optional hook installer that rewrites prompts to be clearer, better scoped, and tuned to the target OpenAI model family when known.
